rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CHRISTOPHER M. DRIVER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. issue is request for payment of extraordinary services. no hearing notes will be sent, but it is noted that extraordinary services provided as personal representative can be compensated at no more than professional fiduciary rate, which is $125 per hour for services up to 1/1/15 and $145 for services provided after 1/1/15, which makes the maximum request $10,687.
